PROCEDURE 581, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO DISMISS LAWSUIT PURSUANT TO CAL. CODE CIV. PROCEDURE 581" IS GRANTED. Motion For Dismissal Of Lawsuit Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. Procedure 581
Off Calendar Apr-18-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. LIRIT KING, Esq. of Bradley/Grombacher, LLP (tel: 805-270-7100) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JULIANN JOHNSON's Motion For Dismissal Of Lawsuit Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. Procedure 581.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to dismiss lawsuit pursuant to Cal. Code Civ. Procedure 581" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
